title: Human methods, new material: designing with AI for the classroom
speakers: Mubarak "Moby" Marafa (Staff Product Designer, Goodnotes), Wendy Liao (Learning and Development Specialist, Goodnotes)
key_points: Walks through the 0-to-1 design journey of Goodnotes Classroom, an AI product built for the human, messy, and high-stakes environment of the classroom.
Grounds the work in human-centered methods: observing real teacher workarounds, conducting classroom observations, building fast prototypes, and running co-creation sessions with educators.
Frames AI as a 'new material' to design with, while letting educators themselves shape product decisions.
Argues that the fastest way to build well is to get closer to the people you are building for.
